content.full_text:
OFFICE OF THE CITY CLERK

CITY CLERK
Dee Latimore-Berry

July 13, 1990

Mr. Mark Morodomi
Legal Division
F.P.P.C.
POB 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Mr. Morodomi:

As discussed in our conversation on July 6, 1990, I am requesting your written opinion regarding an issue raised by Mayor McClair that the assessment of fines by me, the Filing Officer, for late filing of campaign statements is a conflict of interest. I have enclosed copies of the letters notifying Mayor McClair of the assessments and his letter requesting an appeal.

I have been informed my your office that the Mayor is in violation of two separate provisions of the Political Reform Act and that the fines assessed by the City of Seaside referenced in Government Code 91013 is not exclusive and is not negated by fines assessed by the F.P.P.C. Please send confirmation of the information you provided in our telephone conversation. I need this advice letter as soon as possible so that this issue may be clarified. Please contact me by phone (408) 899-6202 upon receipt of this letter. Thank you for your assistance in this matter.

Very truly yours,

[Signature]
Dee Latimore-Berry
Seaside City Clerk

Enc.

cc: Mayor McClair
City Attorney
